## Change summary

Describe what this pull request changes and which player question or repository requirement it addresses.

## Change type

- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Structured data
- [ ] Schema or validation
- [ ] Scripts and tools catalogue
- [ ] Planning tools
- [ ] Project maintenance

## Evidence and classification

- Verification status: `verified` / `calculated` / `community-report` / `review-required`
- Date checked:
- UK-game reproduction path or source:
- Known limitations or conflicting evidence:

## Validation

- [ ] I did not present an assumption or recommendation as verified fact.
- [ ] Canonical names and aliases follow the repository standard.
- [ ] Related identifiers and cross-links were checked.
- [ ] `python scripts/validate_data.py` passes.
- [ ] `mkdocs build --strict` passes.
- [ ] No third-party material was copied without permission or appropriate attribution.

## Screenshots

Add screenshots where they materially support verification or explain a user-interface workflow.
